fight_director.fight_intent: close-quarters reversal in a grounded action scene
fight_director.tactical_objective: redirect the attacker's forward pressure into a wall impact beat
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: attacker crowds the frame and forces the protagonist backward
fight_director.spatial_map: narrow corridor, protagonist screen right moving backward, attacker screen left advancing, wall on right as anchor
fight_director.result_state: attacker stunned against wall in PG-13 style, protagonist gains space
fight_director.readability_plan: grounded blocking, clear contact, dust from wall, reaction shot

combat_beat.screen_action: protagonist pivots off the line and redirects the attacker into the corridor wall
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: smaller fighter uses timing and space rather than force
combat_beat.anticipation: attacker fills foreground and drives forward
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: protagonist shoulder/forearm makes brief contact to redirect
combat_beat.impact_feedback: attacker shoulder hits wall, dust and framed picture shake
combat_beat.aftermath: wall dust falls and both characters reset positions
combat_beat.continuity_out: protagonist now has clear space behind

impact_system.pre_impact: attacker's steps quicken and camera backs up slightly
impact_system.contact_frame: brief shoulder/forearm redirect at corridor center
impact_system.hitstop: tiny pause as attacker meets wall
impact_system.recoil: attacker bounces off wall, protagonist slides one foot to stabilize
impact_system.environment_feedback: dust from wall and picture frame shake

vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame

camera_coverage.screen_direction: attacker advances left to right, protagonist pivots right to left
camera_coverage.subject_priority: attacker pressure, redirect contact, wall reaction
camera_coverage.continuity_from_previous: attacker begins charge from corridor end
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: reaction shot can cut to protagonist breathing and listening

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: attacker advancing in narrow corridor, protagonist backing up
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: grounded action only, no real fighting instruction

key_poses: weapon or limb enters the contact line
clear collision pose with readable overlap
brief hitstop at the contact point
end pose preserves the next cut direction
action_events: guard meets the weapon or strike
combat_tempo.force_feedback: hitstop, sparks or rain spray, and body recoil reveal force transfer
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: major traversal, if present, completes within the first 20-40% and before midpoint
combat_tempo.speed_curve: anticipation, burst into contact, held impact frame, recoil, controlled end pose; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

prompt_canonical_en: Live-action blockbuster-style corridor fight beat, grounded screen choreography, clear redirect contact, wall dust feedback, actor reactions, no gore.
provider_execution_prompt: Grounded live-action blockbuster-style corridor fight beat. Larger attacker advances from screen left and crowds the frame; tired protagonist backs up on screen right, then pivots off the line. One brief shoulder/forearm redirect contact sends the attacker into the right wall. Wall dust puffs, a picture frame shakes, attacker recoils, protagonist resets guard with space behind. Stabilized handheld medium close coverage, readable axis, practical debris only. No gore, no real fighting instruction, no subtitles.

asset_bindings.name: wall picture frame and dust feedback reference

qc_evidence.action_readability: Corridor axis, redirect contact, wall impact, and guard reset are visible.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: Smaller protagonist uses timing and wall position to reverse pressure.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: The shoulder and forearm redirect is visible before the wall thud.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Wall dust, shaking frame, recoil, and foot slide show the impact.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: The corridor wall remains the right-side anchor throughout the shot.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: No abstract VFX is used; practical debris stays readable.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: Grounded stunt-style coverage and practical feedback fit live-action blockbuster language.
qc_evidence.cutability: The shot ends with both characters reset into clear positions.
